title: Fix captureAllMonitorBuffers crash on multi-monitor failures
summary: Add error handling in captureAllMonitorBuffers() so failed monitors are skipped and successful ones still send to Telegram. Currently, if any monitor fails to capture/read, the entire buffer collection crashes and Telegram gets no image packet.

affectedFiles.description: Add try/catch error handling to captureAllMonitorBuffers() so failed monitors are skipped instead of crashing the entire function

executorPrompt: Apply the exact source code edit specified in this proposal to src/gateway/desktop-tools.ts. Replace lines 1682-1698 with the corrected version that includes try/catch error handling around each monitor capture. The change wraps the per-monitor capture and file-read in try/catch so that failed monitors are logged and skipped, while successful monitors still populate the results. After applying, run npm run build to verify the TypeScript compiles correctly.
